---
title: "Oil"
author: "Lance Zou"
date: "2026-03-03"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
#rm(list = ls())
```


```{r}
# Packages 
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(zoo)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)
library(lubridate)
library(tseries)
library(Hmisc)
library(forecast)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(PerformanceAnalytics)
library(sandwich)
library(lmtest)
library(tibble)
library(readxl)
library(janitor)
```

```{r}
# -----------------------------
# 1) Load data + monthly time index
# -----------------------------
oil_raw <- read_csv(
  "DCOILWTICO.csv",
  na = c("", "NA", "."),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  clean_names()

# Clean + prepare daily data
oil <- oil_raw |>
  mutate(date = ymd(observation_date)) |>
  rename(price = dcoilwtico) |>
  select(date, price) |>
  arrange(date) |>
  filter(!is.na(price))

# -----------------------------
# 2) Define end of week data
# -----------------------------
weekly <- oil %>%
  mutate(week = floor_date(date, "week", week_start = 1)) %>%
  group_by(week) %>%
  slice_max(date, n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(week)


y <- weekly$price
```

```{r}
weekly <- weekly |>
  mutate(
    growth = 100 * (price - lag(price)) / lag(price)
  )

adf.test(weekly$price)
kpss.test(weekly$price)

adf.test(na.omit(weekly$growth))
kpss.test(na.omit(weekly$growth))
```


```{r}
P <- weekly$price
g <- weekly$growth
Tn <- length(P)

# -----------------------------
# 2) Choose OOS window (rolling)
# -----------------------------
oos_size  <- 260
start_oos <- Tn - oos_size + 1

# storage: 1-step ahead PRICE forecasts for P_{t+1}
fc_rw    <- rep(NA_real_, oos_size)
fc_nc    <- rep(NA_real_, oos_size)
fc_ar1   <- rep(NA_real_, oos_size)
fc_arima <- rep(NA_real_, oos_size)

actual <- rep(NA_real_, oos_size)

safe <- function(expr, default = NA_real_) {
  tryCatch(expr, error = function(e) default)
}

# -----------------------------
# 3) Rolling 1-step-ahead forecasts
# -----------------------------
for (i in 1:oos_size) {

  t <- start_oos + i - 1         # index of P_t (forecast P_{t+1})
  if (t >= Tn) break             # need actual P_{t+1}

  # Training up to time t
  P_train <- P[1:t]
  g_train <- na.omit(g[2:t])     # growth aligned

  P_t <- P[t]
  actual[i] <- P[t + 1]

  # (A) RW / No-change on PRICE
  fc_rw[i] <- P_t
  fc_nc[i] <- P_t

  # (B) AR(1) on GROWTH -> convert to price
  g_hat_ar1 <- safe({
    fit <- Arima(g_train, order = c(1,0,0), include.mean = TRUE)
    as.numeric(forecast(fit, h = 1)$mean)
  })
  fc_ar1[i] <- P_t * (1 + g_hat_ar1/100)

  # (C) ARIMA(1,1,0) on PRICE
  p_hat_arima <- safe({
    fit <- Arima(P_train, order = c(1,1,0), include.drift = FALSE)
    as.numeric(forecast(fit, h = 1)$mean)
  })
  fc_arima[i] <- p_hat_arima
}

# -----------------------------
# 4) Trim NAs (AFTER loop)
# -----------------------------
keep <- !is.na(actual) & !is.na(fc_rw) & !is.na(fc_ar1) & !is.na(fc_arima)

actual   <- actual[keep]
fc_rw    <- fc_rw[keep]
fc_nc    <- fc_nc[keep]
fc_ar1   <- fc_ar1[keep]
fc_arima <- fc_arima[keep]

# -----------------------------
# 5) Compare MSFE (on PRICE)
# -----------------------------
msfe <- function(a, f) mean((a - f)^2, na.rm = TRUE)

results <- tibble(
  Model = c("RW (price)", "No-change (price)", "ARIMA(1,1,0)", "AR(1) growth"),
  MSFE  = c(msfe(actual, fc_rw),
            msfe(actual, fc_nc),
            msfe(actual, fc_arima),
            msfe(actual, fc_ar1))
) |>
  arrange(MSFE)

print(results)
```

```{r}
#Weekly average forecast (Mar 23-27)
model_final <- Arima(na.omit(weekly$growth), order=c(1,0,0))
g_forecast <- forecast(model_final, h=1)$mean

last_price <- tail(weekly$price,1)

price_forecast <- last_price * (1 + g_forecast/100)
price_forecast
```
